successDesc: Your product is ready to download.
errorDesc: An error occurred while processing your payment. Please try again.

fastPayFlow.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
fastPayFlow.step1: You will be redirected to the payment link
fastPayFlow.step2: Make the payment via Multicaixa Express, POS, or Transfer
fastPayFlow.redirectMessage: Click the button below to open the payment page in a new tab. After making the payment, return here to submit the proof.
fastPayFlow.copyLinkLabel: If the button doesn't work, copy the link:
fastPayFlow.uploadInstructions: Submit a photo or PDF of your payment proof. Our admin will verify and approve it within 24 hours.
fastPayFlow.approvalDesc: You will receive a notification once the payment is approved. The product will become automatically available in your library.

proofUploader.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Allowed: JPG, PNG or PDF

proofUploader.uploadSuccessDesc: Please wait for admin approval (up to 24 hours).
proofUploader.dragDropPlaceholder: Drag your proof here or click to select

paymentMethodSelector.title: Choose payment method
paymentMethodSelector.fastPayDesc: Multicaixa Express, POS, Transfer • Approval up to 24h
paymentMethodSelector.notice: Discounts and coupons are only applicable to payments via Stripe. FastPay uses the product's original price ({{price}}).
